Phoenix's Painting Pros

Delivering lasting color and protection to homes across the Valley. Trusted craftsmanship. Unwavering commitment.

Crafting Color, Protecting Homes

Mountain View Painters, LLC started with a simple goal: to provide Phoenix homeowners with painting services that stand the test of time. We're not just slapping on paint; we're protecting your investment against the harsh Arizona sun.

Learn More →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our painting contractor services.

How long will the exterior paint job last?

With proper preparation and high-quality paint, our exterior paint jobs typically last 7-10 years, even in the harsh Phoenix climate.

Do you offer color consultations?

Yes, we provide expert color consultations to help you choose the perfect palette for your home's style and neighborhood.

Are you licensed and insured?

Yes, Mountain View Painters, LLC is fully licensed and insured for your protection and peace of mind.

Reviews From Our Painting Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Mountain View Painters did an incredible job painting our home in Arcadia. The crew was punctual, professional, and paid attention to every detail. Our house looks brand new! Highly recommend."

Maria S. Exterior Painting

"We hired Mountain View Painters to repaint our living room and kitchen. The team was efficient and did a great job prepping the walls. There were a couple of minor touch-ups needed, but they were quick to respond and resolve the issues. Overall, a good experience."

David K. Interior Painting

"Our kitchen cabinets were looking outdated and worn. Mountain View Painters refinished them beautifully! The color is perfect, and the finish is smooth and durable. It saved us a fortune compared to replacing them. Thank you!"

Jessica L. Cabinet Refinishing
